'''Proxima Dibal''' was a solitary [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in a [[Proxima Dibal system/Legends|system of the same name]]. [[Song serpent]]s and [[Dinko (creature)|dinkos]] were native to the planet's [[Desert/Legends|deserts]].

{{Planet-stub}}
